articles.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Reportedly Set in Korea, Features 'Zero-to-Hero' Campaign
articles.summary: New leaks suggest Infinity Ward's 2026 title, Modern Warfare 4, will be set on the Korean Peninsula. Players will reportedly take on the role of Private Park, a young South Korean soldier, in a massive conflict involving a North Korean invasion. The game promises a 'grounded' combat experience.

articles.title: Modern Warfare 4 (2026) Confirmed for Next-Gen Only, Targeting October 23 Release
articles.summary: Activision's 2026 release schedule points to an October 23 launch for Modern Warfare 4. The game will reportedly abandon PS4 and Xbox One entirely, launching exclusively on PS5, Xbox Series X|S, PC, and potentially the Nintendo Switch 2.

articles.title: Call of Duty 2026 Will Not Arrive on Game Pass on Day One
articles.summary: According to recent reports, Modern Warfare 4 will not launch directly into Xbox Game Pass Ultimate or PC Game Pass. Instead, the title is expected to join the subscription service approximately one year after its initial release.
